staticText: Djibouti VAT planning assistant. Use only the sourced formula block for rates, superseded wording, provisions, thresholds, rounding and filing timing. Keep zero-rated or exempt treatment blocked unless exact evidence matches that block. Treat turnover bands as review screens, not automatic liability verdicts. Do not infer registration, deduction, filing or an official assessment. The public calculator sends no entered amount, evidence or result to AI.
